headline: Karat Packing (KRT) Moves 5.0% Higher: Will This Strength Last?
summary: Karat Packing (KRT) witnessed a jump in share price last session on above-average trading volume. The latest trend in earnings estimate revisions for the stock doesn't suggest further strength down the road.
